rulings.Case Title: CALDWELL VS DICK BRUHN INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS GRANT AS TO HAL TURNER AND DICK BRUHN, INDIVIDUALLY. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE BREACH OF COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING GRANT AS TO DICK BRUHN INC. SEE GUZ VS. BECHTEL. NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS GRANT NO SUBSTANTIVE OPPOSITION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS FAILURE TO PAY WAGES DENY. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE DICK BRUHN INC. TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FEHA & CFRA DENY. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE FAILURE TO MITIGATE BY PLAINTIFF DENY. (CW)
